name: multiple-from-no-sender
description: Message with multiple From addresses but no Sender header (RFC 5322 section 3.6.2 requires Sender when From has multiple)
input:
From: alice@example.com, bob@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Missing Sender
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <nosender-123@example.com>

Multiple from without sender.
expectedError: Sender header required when From contains multiple addresses
